With.Name: Main
With.Query: SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: PointsOfSaleSource -Dimension: PointsOfSaleTarget -Dimension: Products -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: TransferType --TransferType -Expression: ActualStockOriginStore --ActualStockOriginStore -Expression: IdealStockOriginStore --IdealStockOriginStore -Expression: ActualStockDestinationStore --ActualStockDestinationStore -Expression: IdealStockDestinationStore --IdealStockDestinationStore -Expression: CostPVM --CostPVM -Expression: TotalTransfersOut --TotalTransfersOut -Expression: DaysInStore --DaysInStore -Expression: Sales --Sales -Expression: Margin --Margin -Expression: MarginPercentage --MarginPercentage -WhenRequestTotals --Default ---COUNT(*) OVER () AS TotalCount --Expression: TransferType ---MIN(TransferType) OVER() AS TotalTransferType --Expression: ActualStockOriginStore ---SUM(ActualStockOriginStore) OVER() AS TotalActualStockOriginStore --Expression: IdealStockOriginStore ---SUM(IdealStockOriginStore) OVER() AS TotalIdealStockOriginStore --Expression: ActualStockDestinationStore ---SUM(ActualStockDestinationStore) OVER() AS TotalActualStockDestinationStore --Expression: IdealStockDestinationStore ---SUM(IdealStockDestinationStore) OVER() AS TotalIdealStockDestinationStore --Expression: CostPVM ---SUM(CostPVM) OVER() AS TotalCostPVM --Expression: TotalTransfersOut ---SUM(TotalTransfersOut) OTransferReportsTransfersOut --Expression: DaysInStore ---SUM(DaysInStore) OVER() AS TotalDaysInStore --Expression: Sales ---SUM(Sales) OVER() AS TotalSales --Expression: Margin ---SUM(Margin) OVER() AS TotalMargin --Expression: MarginPercentage ---SUM(MarginPercentage) OVER() AS TotalMarginPercentage }} FROM GroupedCte {{ OrderBy -Dimension: PointsOfSaleSource -Dimension: PointsOfSaleTarget -Dimension: Products -Required }} {{Pagination}}
